scripts.dev: node scripts/ensure-env.mjs && pnpm --filter @magic-link-sso/nuxt build && sh -ac 'set -a; [ -f ../../server/.env ] && . ../../server/.env; set +a; nuxt dev -p 3002'
scripts.build: node scripts/ensure-env.mjs && pnpm --filter @magic-link-sso/nuxt build && sh -ac 'set -a; [ -f ../../server/.env ] && . ../../server/.env; set +a; nuxt build'
scripts.format: oxfmt app server scripts tests nuxt.config.ts package.json tsconfig.json vitest.config.ts README.md
scripts.format:check: oxfmt --check app server scripts tests nuxt.config.ts package.json tsconfig.json vitest.config.ts README.md
scripts.lint: oxlint app server scripts tests nuxt.config.ts
scripts.start: node scripts/ensure-env.mjs && sh -ac 'set -a; [ -f ../../server/.env ] && . ../../server/.env; set +a; nuxt start'
scripts.typecheck: nuxi prepare && tsc -p tsconfig.json --noEmit && tsc -p tsconfig.typecheck.json
